title: mitracarpus rhadinophyllus
intro: Mitracarpus rhadinophyllus, also known as the "yellow mint", is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mitracarpus rhadinophyllus include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating gastrointestinal problems. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
